content: "SHA-256 encodes a staircase architecture of 6 segments and 5 falls with monotonically increasing lengths 4·5·9·12·17·17. First musical scoring: D minor, 128 BPM, Bach BWV 851 structural parallel confirmed. Fall rounds produce Z=4.46 higher variance than climbing rounds. Message schedule carries input to falls. W[15] r=+1.000. Scored March 14, 2026."
author: Sheldon K. Salmon
declaration: I declare this entry accurate to the best of my knowledge at the time of sealing.
